allowed_use: next renderer iteration with review-gated Pacuare terrain, drape, hydrography, hydrology, access, and media-rights evidence
forbidden_use: production photoreal Pacuare terrain, water, or rainforest material approval
numeric Pacuare rainfall, stage, discharge, or flow-band promotion
claiming official Pacuare hydrography, banks, rapid stationing, or access geometry
using public social media, guide media, or outfitter media as texture, training, photogrammetry, or packaged source assets
publishing detailed route screenshots as approved real-world reproductions

hydrology_metadata.review_decision: Pacuare rainfall, discharge/stage, and flash-response metadata leads are attached, but no station IDs, feature records, time series, units, time zones, basin relation, rainfall-to-stage lag, unsafe-flow criteria, or guide/outfitter validation are attached, so numeric flow bands remain blocked.

imagery_metadata.review_decision: NASA GIBS/MODIS is retained only as a coarse cloud-screened preview drape. Production Pacuare art still needs higher-resolution cloud-screened Sentinel/Landsat/local orthophoto or first-party/permissioned aerial reference with terms, attribution, manual cloud/shadow review, and guide/geospatial approval.

official_costa_rica_metadata.review_decision: SNIT/IDECORI and Direccion de Agua/SINIGIRH metadata are useful discovery leads for hydrography, stations, protected areas, forest cover, wetlands, recharge, and access/conservation review, but no features, map tiles, station time series, or official geometry are imported.

raw_response_policy.raw_payload_location: Committed only when already represented as compact local source summaries or approved metadata files; transient raw service payloads should remain outside the repo unless a later rights/maintenance review approves them.
raw_response_policy.reason: Keep Pacuare source review compact, reproducible, and rights-safe while preserving local artifact hashes and paths.

reference_media_metadata.review_decision: Reference media remains link-only. No social, guide, outfitter, thumbnail, video, caption, audio, or comment asset may drive textures, training, photogrammetry, marketing, or packaged content until item-level rights and attribution are recorded.

remaining_blockers: Select and approve the Costa Rica working CRS, vertical datum handling, and Unreal georeference transform.
Clip, mosaic, void-review, hydrologically condition, and channel-burn Pacuare DEM inputs before production terrain or Landscape promotion.
Replace or supplement NASA GIBS/MODIS with higher-resolution cloud-screened imagery or first-party/permissioned aerial reference before photoreal material or mask approval.
Import no SNIT, Direccion de Agua, SINIGIRH, SINAC, SENARA, ICE, IMN, OSM, or HydroSHEDS feature geometry until terms, CRS, attributes, Pacuare corridor intersection, and attribution are reviewed.

Attach station IDs, variables, units, time zones, coverage, quality flags, rainfall-to-stage lag, basin relation, unsafe-flow criteria, and guide/outfitter validation before numeric Pacuare flow bands.
Clear protected-area, access, rescue, evacuation, no-publish, and screenshot-publication policy before detailed route packages or public-facing captures.
Attach first-party or rights-cleared rainforest, waterfall, canopy, mist, water-color, and rapid-behavior references before production art promotion.

terrain_dem_metadata.review_decision: Copernicus DEM tiles and heightfield candidates support import testing and gorge-scale preview relief only. Production terrain remains blocked on source selection, CRS/vertical-datum review, clipping, void review, hydrologic conditioning, channel burning, official-layer comparison, and guide/outfitter review.
